results.title: Ripple Tank

layout.title: Ripple Tank — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: Two wave sources interfering. Drag a source to move it and watch the pattern shift. Canvas 2D with per-pixel field rendering.
layout.readout: Drag either dot. Bright bands = constructive interference, dark = destructive.

results.title: Fourier Epicycles
results.description: Rotating circles sum into a square wave.

checks.notes: Fourier epicycle construction and square-wave trace

layout.readout: f(t)=4π∑k=1,3,5,…5 termssin⁡(kt)kf(t)=\frac{4}{\pi}\sum_{k=1,3,5,\dots}^{5\,\text{terms}}\frac{\sin(kt)}{k}f(t)=π4​∑k=1,3,5,…5terms​ksin(kt)​
layout.stageAria: Fourier epicycle construction and square-wave trace

results.title: MDP Gridworld
results.description: Value iteration diffuses rewards into a policy.

checks.notes: Markov decision process gridworld values and policy arrows

layout.title: MDP Gridworld — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: Rewards diffuse backward through a stochastic grid as value iteration improves the policy. Paint walls or rewards, then step the Bellman update. Canvas 2D · AI.
layout.readout: Iteration 8 · values propagate from rewards; slip makes the safe route more attractive.
layout.stageAria: Markov decision process gridworld values and policy arrows

results.title: SIR Epidemic
results.description: Transmission and recovery shape an epidemic curve.

results.title: PID Control
results.description: Tune feedback gains to reach a moving target.

checks.notes: PID control cart and error plot

layout.title: PID Control — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: Tune proportional, integral, and derivative feedback on a cart trying to reach a target. Too little gain is sluggish; too much can ring or blow up. Canvas 2D · control systems.
layout.readout: error 0.320 · velocity 0.70 · integral 0.71
layout.stageAria: PID control cart and error plot

results.title: Bayes Test
results.description: Base rates explain why false positives dominate.

checks.notes: Bayes theorem base-rate grid and confusion matrix

layout.title: Bayes Test — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: A medical test can be accurate and still produce mostly false alarms when the base rate is low. Vary prevalence, sensitivity, and specificity. Canvas 2D · probability.
layout.readout: Positive predictive value 16.2% · false positives 98 per 1000 · true positives 19 per 1000
layout.stageAria: Bayes theorem base-rate grid and confusion matrix
